extortion.description: Koha Foods is a Honolulu-based distributor and wholesaler specializing in Asian food products. The company boasts a diverse selection of over 2,500 items including seafood, condiments, and Korean dishes, catering primarily to local Oahu businesses such as restaurants and supermarkets. Having served Hawaii since 1970, Koha Foods emphasizes quality and connection with the community through its offerings. In addition to distribution, they manufacture their own signature Korean food items using authentic recipes and high-quality ingredients.
